agents.label: OpenAI Codex (ACP adapter: codex-acp)
agents.notes: Includes a compatible Codex CLI. Run `codex login` first to authenticate with OpenAI (or set CONSULT_OPENAI_API_KEY).

agents.label: Claude Agent (ACP shim: claude-agent-acp)
agents.notes: Uses the Claude Code CLI's auth under the hood. Run `claude /login` first, or set CONSULT_CLAUDE_API_KEY or CONSULT_CLAUDE_OAUTH_TOKEN.

agents.label: OpenCode
agents.notes: Needs an LLM provider configured. Run `opencode auth login` to pick a provider (OpenRouter, OpenAI, etc.), or set the provider's API key env var.
